description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build win64 that can be called with inputs for dfhack_ref, structures_ref, artifact-name, and other build settings. The workflow runs on ubuntu-22.04, installs dependencies, clones DFHack and optional structures, fetches 3rd party SDKs if needed, uses caching for ccache, cross-compiles the project with customizable build options, trims and saves the cache, and uploads the resulting artifact.
